n_band.derivation: margin 0.3000 (margins.json[532]: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results); revenue/employee $190,790 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 532282); class <5: 303 firms, avg revenue/firm $261,267 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $78,380 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 72 firms, avg revenue/firm $709,708 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $212,912 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 34 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,229,676 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $368,903 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 13 firms, avg revenue/firm $2,649,308 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $794,792 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 0
n_band.margin_source: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results
